amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 15 — paragraph 1 b (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 15 — paragraph 1 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1b. To address any emerging issues across the internal market with regard to cybersecurity, the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity (ENISA) shall be involved alongside the European Artificial Intelligence Board as set out Article 56, paragraph 2, point (b).
parliament_text: 1b. To address any emerging issues across the internal market with regard to cybersecurity, the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity (ENISA) shall be involved alongside the European Artificial Intelligence Board as set out Article 56, paragraph 2, point (b).
